title: Fermented Turkish Potato Crumble
description: This fermented potato crumble is a delightful brunch dish featuring crisp new potatoes with a touch of tanginess and is perfect for those looking to enjoy a diabetic-friendly meal.

ingredients.name: Juice of 1 lemon
ingredients.notes: lemon juice from a whole lemon

instructions: Place the quartered potatoes on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Mix the unsweetened kefir, dill, and lemon juice in a bowl. Pour this mixture over the potatoes evenly.
Bake for about 45 minutes or until the potatoes are crispy and golden brown.
Allow to cool slightly before serving.
